'''dhamumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetiger|chaetiger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetiger|chaetiger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhamumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæmimith|dhæmimith]] || [[word:dhæmimij|dhæmimij]] || [[word:dhæmimish|dhæmimish]] || [[word:dhæmimi|dhæmimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamumumuth|dhamumumuth]] || [[word:dhamumumuj|dhamumumuj]] || [[word:dhamumumush|dhamumumush]] || [[word:dhamumumu|dhamumumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamumuth|dhamumuth]] || [[word:dhamumuj|dhamumuj]] || [[word:dhamumush|dhamumush]] || [[word:dhamumu|dhamumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamufmuth|dhamufmuth]] || [[word:dhamufmuj|dhamufmuj]] || [[word:dhamufmush|dhamufmush]] || [[word:dhamufmuf|dhamufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhamumuthu|dhamumuthu]] || [[word:dhamumuju|dhamumuju]] || [[word:dhamumushu|dhamumushu]] || [[word:dhamumuku|dhamumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhamumuth|dhamumuth]] || [[word:dhamumuj|dhamumuj]] || [[word:dhamumush|dhamumush]] || [[word:dhamumu|dhamumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhamumuthul|dhamumuthul]] || [[word:dhamumujul|dhamumujul]] || [[word:dhamumushul|dhamumushul]] || [[word:dhamumukul|dhamumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhamumuthuthu|dhamumuthuthu]] || [[word:dhamumujuju|dhamumujuju]] || [[word:dhamumushushu|dhamumushushu]] || [[word:dhamumuku|dhamumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhamumuthun|dhamumuthun]] || [[word:dhamumujun|dhamumujun]] || [[word:dhamumushun|dhamumushun]] || [[word:dhamumukun|dhamumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhamumuthuoro|dhamumuthuoro]] || [[word:dhamumujuoro|dhamumujuoro]] || [[word:dhamumushuoro|dhamumushuoro]] || [[word:dhamumukuoro|dhamumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
